definitions.vi: Ngay lập tức, không chậm trễ.

exampleSentencesTranslated: You need to reply to this email immediately to not miss important information.
I will call you back immediately when the meeting ends.
If you feel unwell, go see a doctor immediately.
exampleSentences: Chị cần trả lời email này ngay để không bị lỡ thông tin quan trọng.
Anh sẽ gọi lại cho em ngay khi cuộc họp kết thúc.
Nếu em cảm thấy không khỏe, hãy đi khám bác sĩ ngay.
notes:
ngay means immediately or right away. It shows that something happens with no delay.

It usually comes after the verb or at the end of the clause to add urgency. Stronger than liền, similar to lập tức (more formal).

It also means right / exactly in time or place: ngay đây (right here), ngay bây giờ (right now).
notes_md:
**ngay** means *immediately* or *right away*. It shows that something happens with no delay.

It usually comes after the verb or at the end of the clause to add urgency. Stronger than **liền**, similar to **lập tức** (more formal).

It also means *right / exactly* in time or place: **ngay đây** (right here), **ngay bây giờ** (right now).

translation.en: Please get to work right away.
